name: Book Writer
description: Manages multi-chapter novel context. Actions: list_chapters, summarize_chapter, build_bible, get_context, save_bible. Use to build a Book Bible so the AI can write new chapters without loading all previous chapters at once.

action.description: Action: list_chapters | summarize_chapter | build_bible | get_context | save_bible

book_json_path.description: Absolute path to book.json (auto-detected if omitted)

output_path.description: Where to save book-bible.md (defaults to same folder as book.json)

content.description: Full markdown content for save_bible action
